commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a native .NET/WinForms Windows taskbar tray companion plus Windows build, packaging, smoke validation, CI, docs, and tests.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug report; this is a new-platform feature PR. The blocking defects are source-reproducible in the PR head by following RefreshAsync, RunGitAsync, and validate_windows_remote.ps1.
